bird.name: Mérida wren
bird.summary: The Mérida wren (Cistothorus meridae), or paramo wren, is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae. It is endemic to Venezuela.

locations.name: 特鲁希略州
locations.summary: 特魯希略州（西班牙語：Estado Trujillo）是委內瑞拉西部的一個州，西北臨馬拉開波湖。面積7,400平方公里，2007年人口711,400人。首府特魯希略。 1899年建州。下分二十個自治市。

locations.name: 塔奇拉州
locations.summary: Táchira State (Spanish: Estado Táchira, IPA: [esˈtaðo ˈtatʃiɾa]) is one of the 23 states of Venezuela.

relations.subject: Mérida wren
relations.evidence: The Mérida wren is found in the Andes of Venezuela from Trujillo south to northeastern Táchira
